title: Manhattan Cocktail
writer: Ethel Doherty, George Marion Jr., Ernest Vajda

plot: Babs and Bob leave their small-town life after graduating from college and go to New York in an effort to make the Broadway big time. Mrs. Renov, the wife of a theatrical producer, develops a fondness towards Bob and gets him a pa...
